parsedJson.summary: The site uses a functional but dated layout with a heavy overlay that obscures the background imagery, and a form that feels cluttered rather than inviting.

issues.title: Hero background image is obscured by heavy overlay
issues.what_observed: The background image of the house is covered by a semi-transparent dark blue/grey overlay that is too dark, making the photo look muddy and indistinct.
issues.why_problem: Customers want to see examples of the work or the neighborhood. A muddy background makes the business look generic and low-effort, reducing the emotional connection to the service.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A clean, high-quality hero image with a subtle gradient overlay (10-20% opacity) only where text sits, allowing the rest of the image to remain crisp and visible.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Reduce the opacity of the hero background overlay to 15-20% or use a localized gradient mask behind the text only, ensuring the house photo is clearly visible.

issues.title: Form fields lack visual hierarchy and breathing room
issues.what_observed: The 'Get a FREE Quote' form is a dense block of inputs with tight padding, mixed input types (text, radio, textarea), and yellow labels that clash with the blue background.
issues.why_problem: A cluttered form feels like 'work' to the user. The lack of spacing and the visual noise of the radio buttons make the user hesitate to start typing, fearing a long or complicated process.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A streamlined form with generous whitespace between fields, distinct sections (e.g., 'Contact Details' vs 'Project Details'), and a cleaner color palette (white inputs on light grey or white background).
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Redesign the form container to have a white background with a subtle drop shadow. Increase padding between fields, group related radio buttons with clear headers, and use a consistent, high-contrast color for labels.

issues.title: Logo appears low-resolution and pixelated
issues.what_observed: The logo in the top-left corner ('Brisbane Roof Restoration Experts') shows visible pixelation and jagged edges, particularly around the house icon and text.
issues.why_problem: Pixelated branding suggests the business is not tech-savvy or detail-oriented. In a trade industry, attention to detail is a key trust signal; a blurry logo undermines that.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A crisp, vector-based (SVG) logo that scales perfectly on all screen sizes, with clean lines and sharp text.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the raster logo image with an SVG vector version to ensure crisp rendering on high-DPI displays.

issues.title: Headline text has low contrast against background
issues.what_observed: The main headline 'Brisbane Roof Restoration Specialists' is white text on a dark, textured background that isn't dark enough, resulting in slightly muddy readability.
issues.why_problem: If a user has to squint to read the main value proposition, they will bounce. Poor contrast signals a lack of professional polish.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: High-contrast typography (e.g., pure white text on a dark overlay, or dark text on a light section) with a drop shadow or text stroke to ensure legibility.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a subtle drop shadow to the headline text or darken the specific area behind the text to ensure a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1.

positive_observations: The phone number is prominent in the header and repeated in the hero section, which is excellent for local service businesses.
The form is 'above the fold' on desktop, allowing users to engage immediately without scrolling.
The use of a real photo (even if obscured) is better than a generic stock image, as it likely represents the local area.
redesign_priorities: 1. Clean up the hero section by reducing the overlay opacity to reveal the background image and improve text contrast.
2. Redesign the lead generation form to be less cluttered, using a white card style with better spacing and clearer visual hierarchy.
3. Upgrade the logo to a vector format and standardize the color palette to remove the clashing yellow/blue combination.
